title: Ciena (CIEN) Q2 Earnings & Revenues Top Estimates, Rise Y/Y
text: Ciena's (CIEN) Q2 revenues benefit from improving supply-chain dynamics. However, Ciena lowers its revenue guidance for fiscal 2023.

title: Ciena Hit Hard On Softer Short-Term Demand Trends
text: Ciena shares face short-term challenges due to order push-outs from service providers and hyperscale cloud operators, impacting near-term growth expectations. Despite weaker near-term outlook, Ciena's long-term prospects remain positive, with opportunities in expanding addressable markets like converged optical edge routing. Investors willing to look past a few lackluster quarters can expect healthy upside, but the market may be cautious until there's evidence of improved order activity.

title: Why Ciena Stock Crashed on Tuesday
text: Ciena beat earnings on both the top and bottom lines Tuesday. Guidance, however, was a little disappointing, with Ciena warning sales could come in below prior expectations both in Q3 and for the year.

title: Ciena (CIEN) Reports Q2 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Ciena (CIEN) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended April 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Ciena (CIEN) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Ciena (CIEN) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.74 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.60 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.50 per share a year ago.

title: Ciena Reports Fiscal Second Quarter 2023 Financial Results
text: HANOVER, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ciena® Corporation, a networking systems, services and software company, announced financial results for fiscal second quarter ended April 29, 2023.

title: Earnings Preview: What To Expect From Ciena On Tuesday
text: Ciena is scheduled to report earnings before Tuesday's open. Here's a closer look.

title: Options Traders Eye Ciena Stock Before Earnings
text: Options traders are targeting Ciena Corp (NYSE:CIEN) ahead of earnings.

title: Ciena 2Q earnings likely to reveal positive growth: earnings preview
text: Ciena Corporation (NYSE:CIEN) is expected to post a positive earnings surprise when it reports second-quarter results before the market opens on Tuesday. The telecommunications-equipment maker is likely to post a 20% rise in earnings per share to $0.60 for the quarter, with its full-year 2023 earnings expected to jump 48%, according to the Zacks Consensus Estimate.

title: Ciena (CIEN) to Post Q2 Earnings: Here's What to Expect
text: Strong demand trends are likely to have boosted Ciena's (CIEN) fiscal Q2 performance. However, global macro weakness remains a concern.

title: Ciena to Webcast Financial Community Event
